title: Create detailed codex-hxrust port plan and import backlog
description: Create codex-hxrust-port-plan.md, import the seed backlog into Beads, and add haxe.rust vendoring/update tasks requested for the port plan.
acceptance_criteria:
- Detailed plan document exists
- Seed backlog is imported into Beads
- haxe.rust vendoring/update tasks are represented in Beads
close_reason: Detailed port plan created, seed backlog imported, and haxe.rust vendoring/update tasks added.

title: Headless one-turn Codex runtime
description:
Stable key: HXCX-3

Build a credential-free, mutation-free one-turn runtime using a mock model stream.
acceptance_criteria:
- Mock model stream is consumed
- Session/turn events match fixtures
- Transcript is written
- Cancellation path is covered

title: HXCX-3.1 Implement mock model stream parser
description:
Stable key: HXCX-3.1

Parse deterministic mock model stream fixtures into internal runtime events.
acceptance_criteria:
- Mock stream fixture parses
- Malformed stream errors are deterministic
- No network credentials needed
- Parsed events compare to golden output
close_reason: Implemented credential-free mock model stream parser. Added upstream-shaped SSE fixture and golden normalized runtime events; parser handles response.created, response.output_text.delta, assistant message output_item.done, response.completed, and response.failed, with deterministic malformed-stream errors. Harness passes through Haxe interp and haxe.rust generated Cargo check/test/run. Filed haxe.rust-oo3.72 for the generic try/catch tail-return lowering issue exposed during implementation.

title: HXCX-3.2 Define model client interface and mock provider
description:
Stable key: HXCX-3.2

Define the provider boundary without binding to real auth/network yet.
acceptance_criteria:
- Provider interface supports stream start/cancel
- Mock provider returns fixture stream
- Future real-provider requirements are documented
- Async profile decision is recorded

title: HXCX-3.3 Implement one-turn session state machine
description:
Stable key: HXCX-3.3

Implement the minimal session/turn flow from prompt to assistant final event.
acceptance_criteria:
- One-turn mock run passes
- Ordered events match fixture
- Terminal state is deterministic
- Errors produce structured event output

title: HXCX-3.4 Expose headless JSONL/app-server adapter harness
description:
Stable key: HXCX-3.4

Expose a simple command/protocol adapter that can be compared with upstream app-server/debug-client behavior for selected requests.
acceptance_criteria:
- Start/submit/status/transcript commands work
- JSONL protocol transcript is emitted
- Adapter is fixture-tested
- Unsupported requests return explicit errors

title: HXCX-3.5 Implement minimal transcript and state store
description:
Stable key: HXCX-3.5

Write deterministic transcript/state artifacts for the mock run.
acceptance_criteria:
- Transcript JSONL writes atomically where possible
- State fixture comparison passes
- No secrets are written
- Corrupt state handling is tested

title: HXCX-3.6 Implement cancellation and interrupt handling
description:
Stable key: HXCX-3.6

Support interrupt/cancel at safe checkpoints in the mock runtime.
acceptance_criteria:
- Cancel fixture passes
- Terminal cancel event is emitted
- Partial transcript behavior is documented
- No orphaned native process path exists in mock mode

title: Cafex seam compatibility
description:
Stable key: HXCX-5

Implement and test the Cafex seams needed for Cafetera compatibility.
acceptance_criteria:
- Session/turn receipts pass fixtures
- Effort/wake bridge fixtures pass
- Minimal goal flow passes
- Cafetera contract subset can target hxrust binary

title: HXCX-5.1 Implement Caf session and turn receipt writers
description:
Stable key: HXCX-5.1

Implement env-driven Caf-compatible session and turn receipt behavior.

Source refs:
- deps/codex/codex-rs/core/src/caf_runtime.rs
acceptance_criteria:
- Absent env vars produce no receipt
- Present env vars write expected receipt JSON
- Duplicate/idempotency behavior is documented
- Receipt fixtures match Cafex schema expectations

title: HXCX-5.2 Implement Caf effort and wake bridge subset
description:

Implement directory/request/receipt bridge behavior for effort and wake controls.

acceptance_criteria:
- Effort request fixture is consumed
- Effort receipt fixture is written

- Unsupported modes are explicit

acceptance_criteria:
- Goal DTOs round-trip
- Goal state transition fixture passes
- Minimal goal tool handler fixture passes

title: HXCX-5.4 Implement wake/restart/session-continuity receipt harness

Represent successor/predecessor session continuity as explicit fixture-tested metadata.
acceptance_criteria:

- Missing/invalid metadata behavior is deterministic
- No hidden inference from side effects

Configure selected Cafetera Codex module contract tests to target the hxrust binary/adapter.

acceptance_criteria:

title: Update haxe.rust pin for try/catch tail fix
description: Pin codex-hxrust to the haxe.rust try/catch tail-return fix and remove the mock model parser local parseJson shape workaround now that direct try/catch returns compile.
acceptance_criteria:
- haxe.rust pin points at the try_catch_tail_nonvoid fix
- Mock model stream parser uses direct try/catch returns
- Pin/audit/import docs record the accepted compiler commit
- Generated portable/metal, protocol ID, and mock model stream gates pass
close_reason: Pinned haxe.rust to 551a00bf08cdaecf3b8b3c499b1d80c86506fa81, recorded haxe.rust-oo3.72 in the curated import/audit docs, removed the mock model parser parseJson try/catch shape workaround, and verified generated portable/metal gates, protocol ID harness, and mock model stream harness.

title: Native tool and state capability slices
description:

Add controlled native wrappers for dry-run tools, process execution, sandbox policy, and state storage.
acceptance_criteria:
- Apply-patch dry-run fixture passes
- Exec wrapper enforces approval policy
- Unsupported sandbox paths fail closed
- State artifact is fixture-comparable

title: HXCX-4.1 Implement apply-patch dry-run compatibility slice
description:
Stable key: HXCX-4.1

Implement or wrap a dry-run apply-patch capability with fixture parity before allowing mutation.
acceptance_criteria:
- Dry-run fixtures pass
- Mutation is disabled by default
- Error cases are deterministic
- Wrapper boundary is documented

title: HXCX-4.2 Implement process exec wrapper and approval model
description:
Stable key: HXCX-4.2

Add process execution behind an explicit approval and policy interface.
acceptance_criteria:
- Denied command never executes
- Approved fixture command executes in test sandbox
- stdout/stderr/truncation are deterministic
- Exit code mapping is tested

title: HXCX-4.3 Implement sandbox permission gate wrapper
description:

Represent sandbox policy as a fail-closed native wrapper instead of rewriting platform sandbox internals first.
acceptance_criteria:

- Policy decisions are fixture-tested
- Bypass path is absent
- Security review notes are attached

title: HXCX-4.4 Spike JSONL versus SQLite state backend

Evaluate whether JSONL state is enough for the experiment or whether SQLite/sqlx parity is needed.
acceptance_criteria:
- JSONL limitations are documented
- SQLite/sqlx wrapper cost is estimated
- Replacement-gate requirement is decided
- No production state migration is implied

title: HXCX-4.5 Implement MCP/tool registry compatibility skeleton
description:
Stable key: HXCX-4.5

Add a minimal tool registry shape compatible enough for selected Codex/Cafex fixtures.
acceptance_criteria:
- Tool registry DTOs exist

- Fixture tool lookup passes
- Future real MCP work is scoped

title: HXCX-4.6 Add telemetry/logging/doctor output
description:
Stable key: HXCX-4.6

Make runtime diagnostics useful without leaking secrets.
acceptance_criteria:
- Doctor output includes build/profile/runtime feature flags
- Logs redact configured secret fields
- Failure report includes fixture IDs
- Diagnostics are fixture-tested

title: Protocol, DTO, schema, and fixture parity
description:
Stable key: HXCX-2

Implement selected Codex/Cafex protocol DTOs and fixture round-trip tests.
acceptance_criteria:
- Selected DTO subset is implemented
- JSON fixtures round-trip
- Schema fingerprints are emitted
- Unknown-field policy is documented

title: HXCX-2.1 Implement core protocol IDs and newtypes
description:
Stable key: HXCX-2.1

Implement strongly typed wrappers for session, turn, thread, tool call, model, and path-like IDs.
acceptance_criteria:
- Newtypes serialize deterministically
- Invalid values are rejected or documented
- Round-trip tests exist
- No broad Dynamic use
close_reason: Implemented protocol ID/newtype slice for session/thread UUIDs, turn/tool/model/path-like string IDs, and JSON-RPC request IDs. Added deterministic serialization/rejection harness; Haxe interp, generated Cargo locked check/test, doctor JSON, and generated Cargo gates pass.

title: HXCX-2.2 Implement JSON boundary and serde bridge policy
description:
Stable key: HXCX-2.2

Define typed JSON encode/decode utilities and native serde boundary where needed.
acceptance_criteria:
- Typed parse/encode helpers exist
- Unknown-field behavior is documented
- Error mapping is deterministic
- Serde bridge wrapper has tests
close_reason: Implemented JSON boundary policy, typed parse/field helpers, deterministic error mapping, unknown-field reporting, and serde bridge facade. JSON boundary, protocol ID, doctor JSON, and generated Cargo gates pass.

title: HXCX-2.3 Implement config/profile DTO subset
description:
Stable key: HXCX-2.3

Implement selected Codex/Caf profile/config DTOs needed for headless mock runtime.

Source refs:
- tools/cafetera/modules/codex/docs/ref/codex-client-runtime-profile-lowering-v1.md
acceptance_criteria:
- Config fixtures parse
- Profile lowering subset is documented
- Secrets are redacted from diagnostic output
- Unsupported config fields are listed
close_reason: Implemented upstream-first config/profile DTO subset with fixture parsing, redacted diagnostics, unsupported field reporting, docs, and generated Rust gate.

title: HXCX-2.4 Implement protocol event/request/response subset
description:
Stable key: HXCX-2.4

Implement the selected headless protocol subset for session start, submit input, interrupt, status, transcript, events, and errors.
acceptance_criteria:
- Selected events round-trip fixtures
- Selected requests/responses round-trip fixtures
- Error payload behavior is deterministic
- Schema fingerprint is emitted
close_reason: Implemented upstream app-server protocol subset with request/response/notification/error fixtures, deterministic JSON round trips, turn-error behavior checks, schema fingerprint emission, docs, and generated Rust gate.

title: HXCX-2.5 Add schema fingerprint and golden fixture diff
description:
Stable key: HXCX-2.5

Add a harness that compares generated DTO fixture output against upstream/Cafex fixtures and emits schema fingerprints.
acceptance_criteria:
- Fixture diff command exists
- Schema fingerprint changes fail CI unless accepted
- Report names missing/extra/changed fields
- Parities and gaps are recorded
close_reason: Added selected upstream app-server schema fingerprint golden, drift diff gate, accept workflow, generated reports, Cafex deferred gap record, and docs. Schema fingerprint, JSON, app-protocol, and generated Cargo gates pass.

Establish the source inventory, Cafex delta classification, fixture oracle, and go/no-go boundaries before implementation starts.

Upstream-first/Cafex-adapter-later decision is recorded; unsupported surfaces and hard kill criteria are listed.
close_reason: G0 inventory, oracle, parity matrix, and kill criteria are complete.

- deps/codex/codex-rs/core/src/goals.rs

acceptance_criteria:

notes: Artifact: docs/cafex-delta-classification.md. Classifies Cafex runtime deltas by owner/seam/category and marks helper-only, headless candidate, native-wrapper candidate, or out-of-scope. Records that f12e-class32f27 was not found locally and is superseded here by HXCX-0.2, with f12e-cafexcc4e6 as the concrete Cafetera seam-ledger reference. Updated plan stance to upstream Codex first, Cafex adapter later.
close_reason: Cafex delta classification recorded with upstream-first/Cafex-adapter-later decision.

title: HXCX-0.3 Build fixture inventory for upstream and Cafex parity
description:
Stable key: HXCX-0.3

Inventory protocol schemas, app-server fixtures, Cafetera contract fixtures, and any runtime snapshots used as comparison oracles.

Source refs:
- codex-rs/app-server-protocol
- codex-rs/protocol
- tools/cafetera/modules/codex/tests/contract
acceptance_criteria:
- Fixture sources are listed
- Fixture ownership is clear
- Unsupported or missing fixtures are tracked
- Harness input format is selected
notes: Artifacts: docs/fixture-inventory.md and reference/fixture-sources.v1.json. Inventory lists upstream app-server JSON/TypeScript schema fixtures, protocol sources, core mock SSE harness, snapshots, tools fixtures, Cafetera contract tests, and Cafex JSON fixtures. Ownership/stage is explicit: upstream Codex is M2-M4 primary oracle; Cafex/Cafetera is M5 adapter oracle. Harness input format selected as codex-hxrust.fixture-run.v1 with JSON/SSE/JSONL fixture bodies. Missing/unsupported fixtures are tracked.
close_reason: Fixture inventory and harness format decision documented.

title: HXCX-0.4 Define parity scorecard and hard kill criteria
description:
Stable key: HXCX-0.4

Create the gate checklist that determines whether the experiment stays helper-only, becomes a sidecar, or can target replacement slices.
acceptance_criteria:
- Scorecard covers build/protocol/runtime/tools/Cafex/security/licensing
- Kill criteria are explicit
- Each milestone maps to a gate
- Decision record template is committed
notes: Artifacts: docs/parity-scorecard.md, docs/templates/gate-decision-record.md, reference/parity-scorecard.v1.json. Scorecard covers build, protocol, runtime, tools/state, Cafex adapter, security, licensing, replacement, and haxe.rust production capability. Hard kill criteria are explicit, each milestone maps to G0-G7, and a gate decision record template is committed.
close_reason: Parity scorecard, kill criteria, gate map, and decision template documented.

title: HXCX-0.5 Decide experiment repository/module ownership
description:
Stable key: HXCX-0.5

Choose where codex-hxrust lives and how it references Cafetera/Codex/haxe.rust snapshots.
acceptance_criteria:
- Owner repo/path is selected
- Generated output policy is defined
- Cross-repo fixture paths are documented
- Brew conversion metadata needs are noted
notes: Artifacts: docs/repository-layout.md, reference/*.pin.json, reference/README.md, vendor/README.md. Decision: codex-hxrust owns the Haxe port experiment; upstream Codex/Cafex/haxe.rust remain external pinned references in G0/G1; no wholesale source copy. Generated Rust is build output and not committed by default. Cross-repo fixture paths and Brew conversion metadata needs are documented.
close_reason: Repository ownership and basic directory/reference policy documented.

title: HXCX-0.6 Decide haxe.rust vendoring and upstream update policy
description:
Stable key: HXCX-0.6

Decide how codex-hxrust references ../haxe.rust during the experiment and how upstream haxe.rust changes are checked, merged, and validated.

Source refs:
- ../haxe.rust/docs/start-here.md
- ../haxe.rust/docs/workflow.md
- ../haxe.rust/docs/profiles.md
- codex-hxrust-port-plan.md
acceptance_criteria:
- Current ../haxe.rust remote, branch, and commit are recorded
- Path pin, submodule, subtree/vendor copy, and external checkout options are compared
- Periodic upstream check cadence and command are documented
- Merge/update must rerun relevant G1/G2 gates before pin changes are accepted
notes: Artifacts: docs/haxe-rust-vendoring-policy.md and updated reference/haxe-rust.pin.json. Decision: use ../haxe.rust as external pinned checkout for G1; compare path pin/submodule/subtree/package options; audit weekly or before pin changes with git fetch/log/diff; pin updates require G1/G2 generated Cargo and fixture gates as they come online.
close_reason: haxe.rust vendoring and upstream update policy documented.

title: haxe.rust production capability report
description:
Stable key: HXCX-7

Convert the Codex pressure test into actionable haxe.rust production-readiness findings.
acceptance_criteria:
- Gap report exists
- Upstreamable fixtures/issues are identified
- Final capability scorecard exists

title: HXCX-7.1 Collect haxe.rust gaps from Codex pressure test

Capture compiler/runtime/interop gaps found while implementing the Codex-shaped workload.
acceptance_criteria:
- Each gap has reproduction info
- Severity and workaround are recorded
- Raw Rust escape pressure is quantified
- Gaps are mapped to source areas

title: Mirror portable-first haxe.rust profile framing
description: Mirror the haxe.rust portable-first / Rust-native opt-in profile framing in codex-hxrust docs and advance the haxe.rust pin after the upstream docs-only clarification.
acceptance_criteria: - AGENTS.md and profile policy docs use portable-by-default / Rust-native opt-in language\n- haxe.rust pin records the upstream docs clarification commit\n- Generated Cargo gates pass for the updated pin
close_reason: Mirrored haxe.rust portable-first profile framing in AGENTS.md, build-profile policy, and baseline topology. Advanced haxe.rust pin to docs-only commit 0b2f196e2b3e8742efe79febe002e97f0924802d; portable/metal generated Cargo gates and protocol ID harness pass.

title: HXCX-7.2 Create upstreamable haxe.rust fixtures/issues
description:
Stable key: HXCX-7.2

Turn stable gaps into minimal fixtures or issues suitable for haxe.rust upstream work.
acceptance_criteria:
- Minimal repros exist for high-value gaps
- Issues/patch candidates are linked
- Codex-specific secrets/context are removed
- Fixtures can run outside Cafetera

title: HXCX-7.3 Write production-readiness report
description:
Stable key: HXCX-7.3

Score haxe.rust against language/runtime/interop/security/performance/maintenance dimensions from the experiment.
acceptance_criteria:
- Capability scorecard exists
- Known caveats are explicit
- Go/no-go recommendation is evidence-backed
- Report feeds replacement review

title: HXCX-7.4 Write post-experiment decision record
description:
Stable key: HXCX-7.4

Archive the experiment outcome and preserve useful outputs even if replacement does not proceed.
acceptance_criteria:
- Decision record is committed
- Reusable artifacts are listed
- Abandoned paths are documented
- Follow-up Beads/Brew conversion notes exist

title: HXCX-7.x Upstream or replace haxe.rust CallStack exceptionToString patch
description: The codex-hxrust G1 check profiles require a local haxe.rust working-tree patch in ../haxe.rust/std/haxe/CallStack.cross.hx. The target-local CallStack.exceptionToString previously used Exception directly, causing generated haxe_call_stack_call_stack_impl_.rs to reference an unresolved root Exception type for this external scaffold. Track upstreaming, replacing, or otherwise eliminating this local patch before treating the haxe.rust pin as clean.
acceptance_criteria: Local patch is either merged upstream, replaced by a cleaner haxe.rust fix, or explicitly carried with tests; reference/haxe-rust-local-patches.v1.json is updated; portable and metal check profiles still pass without untracked compiler drift.
notes: haxe.rust fix landed and pushed as 0849fcf1a556cb86615cfcdf635165ba82fec8da. codex-hxrust pin updated by experiments/codex-hxrust/scripts/update-haxe-rust-pin.sh; local patch ledger now marks the Dynamic CallStack workaround resolved-upstream. Added lix scoped library metadata so local codex-hxrust builds can resolve ../haxe.rust without global haxelib dev, while keeping haxelib smoke validation for released consumer behavior.
close_reason: Resolved by haxe.rust 0849fcf1a556cb86615cfcdf635165ba82fec8da. The local CallStack Dynamic workaround is gone, the pin is updated, patch ledger marks it resolved-upstream, and portable/metal generated Cargo gates pass.

title: HXCX-7.x Make haxe.rust propagate Cargo failure exit status
description: Codex protocol ID hxml printed cargo check errors but haxe exited successfully, so a harness could print success unless it ran Cargo again explicitly. Reduce this to a haxe.rust fixture and make Cargo failure propagate as a non-zero Haxe process exit.
acceptance_criteria:
- Minimal fixture triggers generated Cargo failure
- haxe command exits non-zero when configured Cargo step fails
- Existing haxe.rust workflows/tests remain green
- codex-hxrust harnesses can remove duplicate defensive Cargo checks where appropriate
notes: Resolved upstream in haxe.rust bc945b3263e24f95c3b99d86e87dc281e0b713b2 / haxe.rust-oo3.67. haxe.rust now turns non-zero Cargo handoff results into Haxe compiler errors, with scripts/ci/check-cargo-failure-propagation.sh wired into the haxe.rust harness. codex-hxrust pin updater passed generated Cargo gates for portable and metal.
close_reason: Fixed by haxe.rust bc945b3263e24f95c3b99d86e87dc281e0b713b2; pin updated and generated Cargo gates pass.

title: HXCX-7.x Improve haxe.rust nullable scalar lowering in simple expressions
description: Codex protocol ID work exposed Rust errors for Null<Int>/Option<i32> stringification and charCodeAt comparisons. Reduce to haxe.rust fixtures and improve nullable scalar narrowing/unwrapping in common conditional expressions.
acceptance_criteria:
- Fixtures cover Null<Int> branch narrowing and charCodeAt comparison patterns
- Generated Rust compiles without attempting Display on Option<i32>
- Existing haxe.rust nullable semantics remain correct
- codex-hxrust RequestId/validation workarounds can be revisited
notes: Imported haxe.rust ledger has no existing focused open issue for the codex-hxrust nullable scalar cases. Create generic haxe.rust fixtures for Null<Int> branch narrowing and charCodeAt comparisons before fixing compiler lowering.
close_reason: Resolved by haxe.rust commit 729599493d350bc8d926b61890eb320acf155b6b / haxe.rust-oo3.68, which adds the generic nullable_scalar_charcode snapshot for Null<Int> stringification/comparisons and String.charCodeAt Option comparisons. Codex pin updated and generated Cargo plus protocol ID gates pass.

title: HXCX-7.x Fix haxe.rust generic enum codegen for typed parse results
description: Codex protocol ID work exposed that enum IdParseResult<T> generated Rust with an unbound T and unusable derived traits. Reduce this to a haxe.rust fixture and fix generic enum lowering so typed result enums can be used from app code.
acceptance_criteria:
- Minimal haxe.rust fixture reproduces generic enum with payload T
- Generated Rust binds generic parameter correctly
- Fixture passes in haxe.rust CI/local validation
- codex-hxrust can consider replacing Null<T> workaround in protocol IDs
notes: Imported haxe.rust reference: haxe.rust-oo3.5.1 implemented basic enum variants/tuple args. This codex-hxrust pressure gap is narrower: generic enum payload codegen needs a new generic haxe.rust fixture and compiler fix.
close_reason: Resolved by haxe.rust f521fdb242a7de5f2194633deef6caa3392bafe9 / haxe.rust-oo3.69. haxe.rust now emits generic enum declarations and concrete TEnum use-site type parameters, with generic_enum_payload regression coverage. Codex pin updated; generated Cargo and protocol ID gates pass.

title: HXCX-7.x Improve haxe.rust enum value borrow ergonomics for helper calls
description: Codex JSON boundary work exposed Rust move errors when a parsed haxe.json.Value enum was passed to multiple helper calls. Reduce to a haxe.rust fixture and improve generated borrowing/clone behavior or document the intended Haxe pattern for reusable enum values.
acceptance_criteria:
- Minimal fixture reuses one enum value across multiple helper calls
- Generated Rust either borrows/clones safely or diagnostics document the required Haxe authoring pattern
- Existing haxe.rust borrow tests remain green
- codex-hxrust JSON/DTO helpers can avoid repeated parsing where appropriate
notes: Imported haxe.rust ledger has no existing focused open issue for enum value reuse/borrow ergonomics. Create a generic haxe.rust fixture that reuses one enum value across helper calls before changing compiler clone/borrow behavior or documenting the required pattern.
close_reason: Resolved by haxe.rust 1a394f41a1ee019350faee6d592d21d2c5dc20bd / haxe.rust-oo3.71. haxe.rust now treats Haxe enum values as reusable cloneable values and clones reusable enum locals for typed by-value helper calls, with enum_reuse_helper_calls regression coverage. Codex pin updated; portable/metal generated Cargo gates and protocol ID harness pass.

title: Replacement gate and migration plan
description:
Stable key: HXCX-6

Decide whether the experiment remains helper-only, sidecar/headless, slice replacement, or broader replacement candidate.
acceptance_criteria:
- Replacement comparison report exists
- Security/licensing review exists
- Migration and rollback plan exists
- Decision record selects a mode

title: HXCX-6.1 Compare Cafex patch-stack/rebase friction against hxrust path
description:
Stable key: HXCX-6.1

Estimate whether the hxrust path actually reduces maintenance compared with the fork for supported slices.
acceptance_criteria:
- Cafex patch areas are counted/classified
- hxrust wrapper/generated-code burden is counted
- Rebase friction claim is evidence-backed
- Result feeds decision record

title: HXCX-6.2 Define migration modes and adapter rollout
description:

Document helper-only, sidecar/headless, slice replacement, and broader replacement rollout modes.
acceptance_criteria:
- Each mode has entry/exit criteria
- Rollback path is defined
- Operator/developer impact is described
- No mode bypasses contracts

title: HXCX-6.3 Run replacement go/no-go review
description:
Stable key: HXCX-6.3

Make the formal decision on helper-only, sidecar, slice replacement, broader candidate, or stop.
acceptance_criteria:
- Decision record is complete
- Security/licensing notes are included
- Unsupported surfaces are explicit
- Next mode is selected

title: HXCX-6.4 Write rollback, distribution, and operator notes
description:

Document how to run, disable, or roll back the experiment in Cafetera workflows.
acceptance_criteria:
- Rollback command/path is documented
- Distribution artifact shape is documented
- Operator diagnostics are documented
- No production default is changed without decision record

title: haxe.rust scaffold and compiler gates
description:
Stable key: HXCX-1

Create the minimal Haxe-to-Rust scaffold, locked builds, CI checks, and interop policy.
acceptance_criteria:
- Portable and metal builds are configured
- Minimal generated binary builds
- Generated Cargo crate passes locked check
- Interop policy is documented
close_reason: G1 scaffold complete: portable/metal profiles, locked Cargo gate, interop policy, doctor binary/harness, and haxe.rust audit/pin tooling are implemented and validated.

title: HXCX-1.1 Create codex-hxrust scaffold
description:
Stable key: HXCX-1.1

Create initial src/native/fixtures/harness layout for the experiment.
acceptance_criteria:
- Haxe source tree exists
- Native wrapper tree exists
- Fixtures and harness directories exist
- README explains source-of-truth rules
notes: Artifacts: experiments/codex-hxrust scaffold with hxml/, src/codexhx/, native/, fixtures/, harness/, generated/. README documents upstream-first source-of-truth rules and Cafex adapter-later boundary. Validation: haxe -cp src -main codexhx.Main --interp succeeded; haxe hxml/portable.hxml and haxe hxml/metal.hxml both generated successfully with rust_no_build; generated output was cleaned and generated/.gitignore keeps profile output untracked.
close_reason: Initial Haxe/native/fixtures/harness scaffold created and smoke-validated.

title: HXCX-1.2 Configure portable and metal build profiles
description:
Stable key: HXCX-1.2

Add HXML/Cargo configuration for portable DTO builds and metal runtime builds.

Source refs:
- haxe-rust/docs/workflow.md
- haxe-rust/docs/metal-profile.md
acceptance_criteria:
- portable.hxml builds selected pure code
- metal.hxml builds runtime shell
- rust_output path is deterministic
- rust_no_build/rust_cargo_subcommand policy is documented
notes: Artifacts: experiments/codex-hxrust/hxml/{portable,metal,portable.codegen,metal.codegen}.hxml, experiments/codex-hxrust/hxml/README.md, docs/build-profile-policy.md. Validation: portable.codegen and metal.codegen passed; portable.hxml and metal.hxml passed cargo check after local haxe.rust CallStack patch; haxe.rust examples/hello still builds. Generated output cleaned. Local haxe.rust patch recorded in reference/haxe-rust-local-patches.v1.json and follow-up codex-hxrust-rat.5 filed.
close_reason: Portable and metal build profiles configured, documented, and smoke-validated.

title: HXCX-1.3 Add generated Cargo CI gates
description:
Stable key: HXCX-1.3

Run generated Rust through locked Cargo checks and tests.
acceptance_criteria:
- cargo check --locked runs
- cargo test --locked runs for generated crate
- clippy/rustfmt posture is documented
- Build works without model credentials
close_reason: Added generated Cargo gate script and docs; validated portable/metal cargo check --locked and cargo test --locked.

title: HXCX-1.4 Document typed extern and raw Rust allowlist policy
description:
Stable key: HXCX-1.4

Define exactly where native Rust wrappers are allowed and how Haxe externs bind to them.

Source refs:
- haxe-rust/docs/interop.md
- haxe-rust/docs/metal-profile.md
acceptance_criteria:
- Allowed interop mechanisms are listed
- Raw Rust app-code ban is stated
- Wrapper ownership/test requirements are stated
- Security-sensitive wrappers are marked fail-closed
close_reason: Documented interop boundary policy, raw Rust ban, wrapper ownership/tests, and fail-closed security wrapper rules; scaffold still passes Haxe smoke and generated Cargo gates.

title: HXCX-1.5 Implement minimal generated binary with doctor JSON
description:
Stable key: HXCX-1.5

Build the smallest generated binary that prints version/toolchain/profile information as machine-readable JSON.
acceptance_criteria:
- Binary exits 0
- Doctor JSON includes versions/profiles/features
- Fixture test asserts the JSON shape
- No credentials or real Codex runtime needed
close_reason: Implemented generated doctor JSON binary, profile/toolchain/pin reporting, jq shape fixture, and portable/metal harness; doctor harness and locked generated Cargo gates pass.

title: HXCX-1.6 Add haxe.rust pin and upstream audit tooling
description:
Stable key: HXCX-1.6

Add scaffold tooling that records the haxe.rust pin, audits upstream changes, and prevents silent compiler/runtime drift.

Source refs:
- codex-hxrust-port-plan.md
- ../haxe.rust/docs/workflow.md
acceptance_criteria:
- Scaffold records pinned haxe.rust commit and remote in doctor JSON
- Upstream audit command reports commits since the pinned SHA
- Updating the pin requires locked generated Cargo checks
- Runtime-affecting haxe.rust updates are routed to fixture gates once G2/G3 exist
close_reason: Added haxe.rust audit/update tooling, doctor pin mirror, gated pin updater, and audit note; pin advanced to ba76e486 after locked generated Cargo gates passed.
